title: Require Explanation Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that instructs a machine to accompany its primary output with a natural-language explanation of how or why that output was produced.

## When to use
Enable in evaluation, audit, or user-facing pipelines where human reviewers need to understand model reasoning. Explanations increase output length; disable in high-throughput pipelines where latency is critical and rationale is not needed.

## Notes
See [Detailed Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:detailed-flag;textable) for broader verbosity control and [Decision](https://capdag.com/browse/media:decision;json;record;textable) for the canonical output type that may carry explanations alongside binary verdicts.
